ohtani.title: Ohtani goes deep as the Dodgers blank the Rays
ohtani.blurb: Shohei Ohtani hits a solo home run and Justin Wrobleski throws six scoreless innings in the Dodgers' 1-0 win over the Rays

imanaga.title: Pete Crow-Armstrong's cycle highlights walk-off win
imanaga.blurb: Pete Crow-Armstrong hits MLB's first cycle of 2026 and Matt Shaw walks it off in the Cubs' 5-4 win over the Rockies

suzuki.title: TJ Rumfield, Willi Castro lead Rockies to 5-2 win
suzuki.blurb: TJ Rumfield crushes a two-run home run and Willi Castro hits an RBI double to lead the Rockies to a 5-2 win over the Cubs

yoshida.title: George Springer hits 300th homer in Blue Jays' win
yoshida.blurb: George Springer hits his 300th home run and Davis Schnieder racks up two RBI's in the Blue Jays' 6-1 win over the Red Sox

okamoto.title: George Springer hits 300th homer in Blue Jays' win
okamoto.blurb: George Springer hits his 300th home run and Davis Schnieder racks up two RBI's in the Blue Jays' 6-1 win over the Red Sox

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in the 10th inning and Rikuu Nishida collects his first RBI in the White Sox 4-3 win over the Tigers

matsui.title: Andre Pallante strikes out six in Cardinals' win
matsui.blurb: Andre Pallante strikes out six batters and JJ Wetherholt records three hits in the Cardinals' 3-2 win over the Padres
